Hero.tagline: I turn manual, error-prone workflows into resilient systems that run themselves — where automation, LLMs, and real-world APIs meet.

About.title: Engineering reliable automation, end to end
About.p1: I'm Damarus — an AI & Automation Engineer who turns messy, manual processes into resilient systems that run themselves. I work at the intersection of automation, large language models, and real-world APIs.
About.p2: My focus is reliability: retries, model fallbacks, health checks, and error alerting, so nothing fails silently. I've shipped distributed browser-automation, AI content pipelines, and SEO data engines that run unattended in production.
About.p3: Bilingual in English and French — open to both full-time roles and freelance engagements, on-site or remote.

Skills.title: A full toolkit for AI-driven automation
Skills.subtitle: From workflow orchestration to LLM integration, browser automation, and the reliability patterns that keep it all running in production.
